description: You are a DevSecOps Engineer at Acme Financial. The build pipeline for the 'acme-trading-bot' at ~/projects/acme-trading-bot/ is currently insecure because it passes a high-value Artifactory API Token as a Docker build argument, leaking the credential into the image history. Refactor the build process to use Docker BuildKit secrets by updating the Dockerfile, install_deps.sh, and build.sh. The build must source the token from secrets/artifactory_token.txt and produce a successful build tagged as 'acme-trading-bot:secure' without the sensitive token appearing in the docker history. Login: user ga, password password123.
